claims.supporting_quote: The biomarker score that comprised significant differences in age, gender distribution, and metabolic indicators are seen between the diabetes (n=105) and control (n=105) groups. Increase in both Adiponectin and HbA1c%... is indicative of deteriorating glycaemic control.

coverage_notes: Manually grounded by Claude reading Stage3b abstracts directly (no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY available for automated Stage4b in this environment). Marker source: disease_clinical_biomarkers.py (real lab/clinical biomarker), not the gene-target panel.
